title: Quarterly Access Review Dataset — Interactive Sessions by System

compliance.assurance_rationale: Auto-migrated from cat-22 markdown on Phase 1.3 run. Requires SME review to confirm clause accuracy, mode (satisfies vs detects-violation-of), and assurance level (contributing/partial/full).

app: Splunk Add-on for CyberArk (4295), Splunk Add-on for Microsoft Windows (742)
spl:
index=pam sourcetype=cyberark:ptalog action="Logon" earliest=-90d@d latest=@d
| lookup bes_cyber_asset_inventory.csv address AS address OUTPUT bes_system impact_rating
| where isnotnull(bes_system)
| stats earliest(_time) as first latest(_time) as last dc(address) as targets by user, bes_system, impact_rating
| sort impact_rating, user
value: We assemble quarterly interactive access by user and BES asset to accelerate access certification and attestation.
implementation: (1) Define quarter macros for reproducible windows. (2) Export to GRC certification tool. (3) Restrict index ACLs. (4) Store signed attestation back via HEC if desired.
knownFalsePositives: Administrative tasks, scheduled jobs or platform updates can match this pattern — correlate with change management, maintenance windows and user role before raising severity.
